questions.q: From the following incomplete records of Shri Ram, prepare a statement of affairs as on 31st March, 2022.
questions.answer: Statement of affairs as on 31st March, 2022.

questions.q: X, Y and Z are partners sharing profits and losses in the ratio of 5:3:2. Their capitals were Rs. 60,000, Rs. 90,000 and Rs. 1,20,000 respectively on 1st April, 2021. The following is the extract of their Balance Sheet as on 31st March, 2022. Prepare Revaluation Account and Partners' Capital Accounts.
questions.answer: Revaluation Account and Partners' Capital Accounts.

questions.q: The books of A and B, who are partners, are to be closed on the following basis. Prepare the necessary ledger accounts.

Prepare Profit and Loss Appropriation Account of XYZ from the following: Drawings of partners during the year Rs. 80,000, General Reserve Rs. 1,00,000, Profit for the year Rs. 4,00,000, Manager's commission Rs. 20,000.
X and Y are partners in the ratio of 3:2. Their capitals on 1st April, 2022 were Rs. 1,00,000 and Rs. 80,000 respectively. Prepare Profit and Loss Appropriation Account of the firm.

A, B and C are partners of a firm sharing profits and losses in the ratio of 5:3:2. Their capitals on 1st April, 2021 were Rs. 80,000, Rs. 60,000 and Rs. 40,000 respectively. Prepare Profit and Loss Appropriation Account.

X and Y are partners in a firm. Their capital on 1st April, 2022 was Rs. 1,00,000 and Rs. 80,000 respectively. The firm's profit for the year was Rs. 60,000. Prepare Profit and Loss Appropriation Account.
From the following Balance Sheet of X and Y, prepare Revaluation Account and Partners' Capital Accounts.
questions.answer: Revaluation Account and Partners' Capital Accounts.

questions.q: The following is the Balance Sheet of A and B as on 31st March, 2022. Prepare Profit and Loss Appropriation Account.
